title: cyperus fuligineus var. calcicola
intro: Cyperus fuligineus var. calcicola, also known as the calcicolous umbrella sedge, is a plant species that belongs to the sedge family. It is primarily found in calcareous environments, including limestone areas. The medicinal properties of Cyperus fuligineous var. calcicola include its ability to reduce inflammation and kill bacteria, which is attributed to the presence of certain compounds such as flavonoids and saponins. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, fever, and skin conditions, and can be consumed as a tea or used in topical applications.
